sections.markdown:
- Activity: Morning Run
- Started: 2025-02-19 06:10
- Distance: 7 km
- Moving time: 39:23
- Elapsed time: 39:32
- Elevation gain: 42.8 m
- Average heart rate: 177.9 bpm
- Max heart rate: 191 bpm
- Average watts: 202.5 W
- Average speed: 10.7 km/h
- Apple Health recorded `2` during-run heart-rate samples. Average HR was `176.6 bpm`, ranging from `168.6` to `184.5 bpm`.

- Apple Health cadence averaged `162.4 spm`, with a working range of `155.7` to `165.1 spm` after excluding `2` start-stop outliers below `100 spm`.
- First-half cadence averaged `162.8 spm` and second-half cadence averaged `161.1 spm` (-1.7 spm), which looks mechanically stable.

- Strava moving pace averaged `5:36 /km` across `7.023 km` in `39:23` moving time.
- Estimated first-half moving pace was `5:24 /km` and second-half pace was `5:49 /km` (+24 s/km), so pace faded meaningfully in the back half.

- Strava summary HR came in at `177.9 bpm` average and `191 bpm` max.
- Distance-split HR averaged `170.4 bpm` in the first half and `184.7 bpm` in the second (+14.3 bpm), which shows clear late cardiovascular drift.

- Moving time was `39:23` out of `39:32` elapsed (99.6%), which kept stoppage cost negligible.
- The downsampled moving stream shows `3` stop segments and `0.3%` stationary samples, so the run was mostly continuous with a few interruptions.

- Strava logged about `67.4 m` of climbing, with altitude moving between roughly `1.6 m` and `16.8 m`.
- Estimated climbing was `30.4 m` in the first half and `37.0 m` in the second, so most of the climbing landed later.
